channel.title: Wordfence — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Wordfence (wordfence).

item.title: CVE-2026-5411 · 8.8 HIGH — WP Captcha PRO <= 5.38 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: The WP Captcha PRO (the premium version of the Advanced Google reCAPTCHA plugin, both have the same slug) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file upload in all versions up to, and including, 5.38. This is due to a capability check in the…

item.title: CVE-2026-5415 · 8.8 HIGH — WP Captcha PRO <= 5.38 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Authentication Bypass via Temporary Login Link
item.description: The WP Captcha PRO (the premium version of the Advanced Google reCAPTCHA plugin, both have the same slug) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass in all versions up to, and including, 5.38. This is due to the ajax_run_tool() AJAX…

item.title: CVE-2026-10580 · 9.8 CRITICAL — Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce <= 1.9.4 - Unauthenticated Authentication Bypass to Administrator Account Takeover via REST API
item.description: The Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass leading to Administrator Account Takeover in all versions up to and including 1.9.4. This is due to a logic conflation in HippooPermissions::get_user_pe…

item.title: CVE-2026-10586 · 7.2 HIGH — Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns <= 6.1.3 - Authenticated (Author+) Server-Side Request Forgery
item.description: The Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.3 via the `save_ai_generated_image()` function. This makes it po…

item.title: CVE-2026-8653 · 6.5 MEDIUM — MasterStudy LMS Pro Plus <= 4.8.20 - Authenticated (Instructor+) SQL Injection via 'columns' Parameter
item.description: The MasterStudy LMS Pro Plus plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'columns' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.8.20 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient prepa…

item.title: CVE-2026-10737 · 7.5 HIGH — SP Project & Document Manager <= 4.71 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Information Disclosure via view_file() Function
item.description: The SP Project & Document Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capability check on the view_file function in all versions up to, and including, 4.71. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers t…

item.title: CVE-2026-9732 · 4.3 MEDIUM — EmergencyWP <= 1.4.2 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Plugin Settings Update
item.description: The EmergencyWP – Dead Man's switch & legacy deliverance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.2. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the form_settings_ui (setti…

item.title: CVE-2026-7421 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Passeum Ticketing <= 1.0 - Authenticated (Administrator+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'shop_name' Setting
item.description: The Passeum Ticketing plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 1.0. This is due to the `get_shop_url()` method returning the `shop_name` setting value without sanitization when it begins…

item.title: CVE-2026-5073 · 7.5 HIGH — ARMember Premium <= 7.3.1 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via 'order' Parameter
item.description: The ARMember Premium plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'order' parameter of the 'arm_directory_paging_action' AJAX action in all versions up to, and including, 7.3.1. This is due to insufficient escaping on the user-supplied…

item.title: CVE-2026-5074 · 6.5 MEDIUM — ARMember Premium <= 7.3.1 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) SQL Injection via 'sSortDir_0' Parameter
item.description: The ARMember Premium plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'sSortDir_0' parameter of the `get_private_content_data` AJAX action in all versions up to, and including, 7.3.1. This is due to insufficient sanitization of the user-su…

item.title: CVE-2026-5076 · 9.8 CRITICAL — ARMember Premium <= 7.3.1 - Insecure Password Reset Mechanism to Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation
item.description: The ARMember Premium plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to an insecure password reset mechanism in all versions up to, and including, 7.3.1. The plugin stores a plaintext copy of the password reset key in the `arm_reset_password_key` user meta field…

item.title: CVE-2026-1829 · 8.8 HIGH — Content Visibility for Divi Builder <= 4.02 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Remote Code Execution
item.description: The Content Visibility for Divi Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 4.02 via the 'et_pb_text' shortcode 'cvdb_content_visibility_check' parameter. This makes it possible for authen…

item.title: CVE-2026-5191 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Tiled Gallery Carousel Without JetPack <= 3.1 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'data-image-title'
item.description: The Tiled Gallery Carousel Without JetPack plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting via the 'data-image-title' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 3.1 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. Th…

item.title: CVE-2026-9722 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Laiser Tag <= 1.2.5 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Plugin Settings Update via Settings Form
item.description: The Laiser Tag plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.2.5. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the addOptionsPageFields function. This makes it possible for unauthe…

item.title: CVE-2026-8422 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Remove meta boxes per user role <= 1.01 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Settings Update
item.description: The Remove meta boxes per user role plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.01. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the 'remove-meta-boxes-per-user-role' page. This…

item.title: CVE-2026-1451 · 6.1 MEDIUM — rognone <= 0.6.2 - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via 'a' Parameter
item.description: The rognone plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'a' parameter in versions up to, and including, 0.6.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated atta…

item.title: CVE-2026-9730 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Remove NoFollow Commenter URL <= 1.0 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Settings Update
item.description: The Remove NoFollow Commenter URL plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.0. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the gmz_comment_settings_save function. This makes i…

item.title: CVE-2026-3620 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Word Replacer <= 0.4 - Authenticated (Administrator+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'Replacement' Parameter
item.description: The Word Replacer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'replacement' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 0.4. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible…

item.title: CVE-2026-9599 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Tectite Forms <= 1.3 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Settings Update
item.description: The Tectite Forms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.3. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the admin_init function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated…

item.title: CVE-2026-8885 · 6.4 MEDIUM — DeMomentSomTres Shortcodes <= 1.1.1 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Shortcode Attributes
item.description: The DeMomentSomTres Shortcodes plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the plugin's 'callout' shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.1.1. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on t…

item.title: CVE-2026-4080 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Easy Cart <= 1.8 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Shortcode Attributes
item.description: The Easy Cart plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'add_to_cart' shortcode in all versions up to and including 1.8. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user-supplied shortcode att…

item.title: CVE-2026-2425 · 6.1 MEDIUM — hiWeb Migration Simple <= 2.0.0.1 - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via 'new_domain' Parameter
item.description: The hiWeb Migration Simple plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'new_domain' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.0.1 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it pos…

item.title: CVE-2026-9723 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Google Plus One Bottom <= 0.0.2 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Plugin Settings Update via Settings Page
item.description: The Google Plus One Bottom plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 0.0.2. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the googlePlusOneAdmin function. This makes it possible f…

item.title: CVE-2025-5085 · 5.5 MEDIUM — wp-nano-ad <= 1.31 - Authenticated (Administrator+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via blogrole_link Parameter
item.description: The WP Nano AD plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the ‘blogrole_link’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.31 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authe…

item.title: CVE-2026-1450 · 6.1 MEDIUM — rognone <= 0.6.2 - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via 'mode' Parameter
item.description: The rognone plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'mode' parameter in versions up to, and including, 0.6.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated a…

item.title: CVE-2026-4071 · 4.3 MEDIUM — BirdSeed <= 2.2.0 - Cross-Site Request Forgery via BirdSeed Token Change
item.description: The BirdSeed plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 2.2.0. This is due to missing nonce validation in the birdseed_plugin_settings_page() function. The function processes the 'birdseed_t…

item.title: CVE-2026-2382 · 6.4 MEDIUM — FPW Category Thumbnails <= 1.9.5 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'id' Parameter
item.description: The FPW Category Thumbnails plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'id' parameter of the 'fpw_fs_get_file' AJAX action in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.5. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and…

item.title: CVE-2026-9234 · 4.3 MEDIUM — JTL-Connector for WooCommerce <= 2.4.1 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Settings Modification via Multiple Functions
item.description: The JTL-Connector for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 2.4.1. This is due to missing capability checks and nonce verification on the admin_post_settings_save_woo-jtl-connector a…

item.title: CVE-2026-4081 · 6.4 MEDIUM — ZeM STL <= 1.0 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Shortcode Attributes
item.description: The ZeM STL plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the [zemstl] shortcode in all versions up to and including 1.0. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user-supplied shortcode attributes…

item.title: CVE-2026-8206 · 9.8 CRITICAL — Kirki 6.0.0 - 6.0.6 - Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via 'handle_forgot_password'
item.description: The Kirki – Freeform Page Builder, Website Builder & Customizer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation via account takeover in all versions 6.0.0 to 6.0.6. This is due to the plugin accepting an arbitrary email address when a user…

item.title: CVE-2026-10100 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Simple Custom Login Page <= 1.0.3 - Authenticated (Admin+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Simple Custom Login Page plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the color settings fields (Page Background, Form Background, Text Color, Link Color) in versions up to and including 1.0.3. This is due to insufficient…

item.title: CVE-2026-3722 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Auto Image Attributes From Filename With Bulk Updater (Add Alt Text, Image Title For Image SEO) <= 4.9 - Authenticated (Author+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Image Attribute
item.description: The Auto Image Attributes From Filename With Bulk Updater (Add Alt Text, Image Title For Image SEO) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the attachment metadata in all versions up to, and including, 4.9 due to insuffi…

item.title: CVE-2026-9048 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Slider Revolution 7.0.0 - 7.0.14 - Incorrect Authorization to Authenticated (Contributor+) Sensitive Information Exposure
item.description: The Slider Revolution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in versions 7.0.0 - 7.0.14, via the 'slider.get.full' AJAX Action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above,…

item.title: CVE-2026-9050 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Slider Revolution 6.0.0-6.7.55 and 7.0.0-7.0.14 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Contributor+) Arbitrary Plugin Deactivation
item.description: The Slider Revolution plugin for WordPress in versions 6.0.0-6.7.55 and 7.0.0-7.0.14 is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it po…

item.title: CVE-2026-8382 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Advanced Custom Fields (ACF®) <= 6.8.1 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary Post Modification via Front-End Form '_post_title' and '_post_content' Parameters
item.description: The Advanced Custom Fields (ACF®) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 6.8.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it p…

item.title: CVE-2026-7459 · 7.5 HIGH — Simple History – Track, Log, and Audit WordPress Changes <= 5.26.0 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Account Takeover via Missing Authorization on Event Reaction Endpoint
item.description: The Simple History – Track, Log, and Audit WordPress Changes plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authenticated (Subscriber+) account takeover in all versions up to, and including, 5.26.0 via the event reaction endpoints (react_to_event() / unreact_…

item.title: CVE-2026-7465 · 8.8 HIGH — Spectra Gutenberg Blocks <= 2.19.25 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Remote Code Execution via Arbitrary PHP Function Call via Block Attributes
item.description: The Spectra Gutenberg Blocks – Website Builder for the Block Editor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 2.19.25. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level…

item.title: CVE-2026-9757 · 7.5 HIGH — GEO my WP <= 4.5.5 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via 'swlatlng' / 'nelatlng' Parameters
item.description: The GEO my WP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'swlatlng' and 'nelatlng' parameters in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.5 The parameters are read from $_SERVER['QUERY_STRING'] via parse_str() (bypassing WordPress's wp…

item.title: CVE-2026-4290 · 9.1 CRITICAL — WP Travel Pro <= 10.6.0 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Arbitrary User Deletion Including Administrators
item.description: The WP Travel Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary user deletion via the /wp-json/wp-travel/v1/travel-guide/{user_id} REST API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 10.6.0. This is due to the check_permission() callback uncond…

item.title: CVE-2025-12714 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Rank Math SEO – AI SEO Tools to Dominate SEO Rankings <= 1.0.271 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Homepage Settings Modification
item.description: The Rank Math SEO – AI SEO Tools to Dominate SEO Rankings plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capability check on the update_site_editor_homepage function in all versions up to, and including, 1.0.271. This make…

item.title: CVE-2026-9189 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Contact Form 7 – PayPal & Stripe Add-on <= 2.4.9 - Unauthenticated Payment Bypass via Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity via PayPal IPN Handler ('invoice'/'mc_gross' Verification)
item.description: The Contact Form 7 – PayPal & Stripe Add-on plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Payment Bypass via Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.9. Although `cf7pp_paypal_ipn_handler()` correctly validates…

item.title: CVE-2026-10039 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Frontend Admin by DynamiApps <= 3.28.28 - Authenticated (Administrator+) SQL Injection via 'order' Parameter
item.description: The Frontend Admin by DynamiApps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'order' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 3.28.28 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient pr…

item.title: CVE-2026-6075 · 8.1 HIGH — Media Library Assistant <= 3.35 - Cross-Site Request Forgery via Bulk Action Form
item.description: The Media Library Assistant plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in versions up to, and including, 3.35 This is due to missing nonce verification on the bulk action handlers in the settings tab handlers. This makes it poss…

item.title: CVE-2025-11262 · 7.2 HIGH — Link Whisper Free <= 0.9.0 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Link Whisper Free plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the user_id parameter in all versions up to, and including, 0.9.0 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unaut…

item.title: CVE-2026-3655 · 9.8 CRITICAL — OTP Login With Phone Number, OTP Verification <= 1.8.60 - Unauthenticated Authentication Bypass via Firebase OTP Verification
item.description: The OTP Login With Phone Number, OTP Verification plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authentication bypass in versions 1.8.50 through 1.8.60. This is due to the Firebase verification flow in the `lwp_ajax_register` AJAX handler not binding the Fir…

item.title: CVE-2026-9243 · 6.4 MEDIUM — The Plus Addons for Elementor <= 6.4.15 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'carousel_direction' Parameter
item.description: The Plus Addons for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'carousel_direction' parameter of the Carousel Anything widget in versions up to, and including, 6.4.15 This is due to insufficient output escapin…

item.title: CVE-2026-9714 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Simple Divi Shortcode <= 1.2 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'id' Shortcode Attribute
item.description: The Simple Divi Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'id' parameter of the [showmodule] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 1.2 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping…

item.title: CVE-2025-14042 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme <= 13.4.1 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Portfolio Project Details
item.description: The Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'Project Details' custom field in Portfolio Items in all versions up to, and including, 13.4.1. This is due to insufficient inpu…

item.title: CVE-2025-11993 · 8.8 HIGH — WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination <= 1.8 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) PHP Object Injection
item.description: The WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to PHP Object Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.8 via the 'settings' parameter in the 'import_settings' function. This is due to deserialization of…

item.title: CVE-2026-8732 · 9.8 CRITICAL — WP Maps Pro <= 6.1.0 - Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account Creation to wpgmp_temp_access_ajax AJAX Action
item.description: The WP Maps Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account Creation in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.0. This is due to the wpgmp_temp_access_ajax AJAX action being registered with wp_ajax_nopriv_ and…
